sentence: go to the-internet.herokuapp.com/dynamic_loading/2, start the loading, wait until the hidden text finishes loading, then read it

workflow.name: On Browser Home Page
workflow.description: Start the process from a fresh browser tab.
triggers: If the current URL is chrome://new-tab-page/

workflow.name: On Dynamic Loading Page
workflow.description: Locate and click the 'Start' button to initiate the dynamic load.
triggers: If a button with text 'Start' is visible

workflow.name: Waiting for Content
workflow.description: Wait for the hidden content to finish loading and become visible.
triggers: If a div with id 'loading' is visible
If the text 'Hello World!' is NOT visible

workflow.name: Content Loaded
workflow.description: Confirm the hidden text has loaded and read it.
triggers: If the text 'Hello World!' is visible

issues.message: Empty actions with a wait/verification-sounding name -- looks like an intentional 'sit here until something external changes' state. Confirm that's what you meant.
Last state's actions don't mention 'Terminate'. NetGent's web agent needs an explicit terminate instruction to stop cleanly.
